spine.label: Assessment
spine.definition: A scored behavioural / competency assessment establishes the working signal.

spine.label: Evidence Collection
spine.definition: Evidence accrues into the longitudinal record (one datapoint per progression).

spine.label: AI Interpretation
spine.definition: AI interprets signals/competencies into an explainable diagnosis.

spine.label: Learning Plan
spine.definition: A personalised learning / development plan is composed.

spine.label: Practice Activity
spine.definition: Practice / activities are surfaced for the learner to act on.

spine.label: Behaviour Reinforcement
spine.definition: Behavioural reinforcement nudges the learner toward the target pattern.

spine.label: Competency Development
spine.definition: Competency / EI development is tracked against the genome.

spine.label: Personalized Intervention
spine.definition: A targeted intervention is delivered for the diagnosed gap.

spine.label: Progress Measurement
spine.definition: Progress is measured as a longitudinal trend vs the baseline.

spine.label: Reassessment
spine.definition: Interval / exit re-administration of the existing assessment (close-the-loop).

spine.label: Improvement Validation
spine.definition: Improvement is validated against the prior datapoint(s).

spine.label: Outcome Achievement
spine.definition: A realized outcome is captured into the canonical ledger.

spine.label: Promotion
spine.definition: The subject is promoted along the lifecycle (Curiosity→Insight→Growth→Mastery).

spine.label: Continuous Development
spine.definition: The loop re-enters: the next growth cycle begins from the new baseline.

invariants.title: Recommendation → Learning / Practice / Intervention (the growth action is generated)
invariants.mechanism: Recommendation engines feed the learning-path + intervention catalogs, so every diagnosis yields a concrete next action. COMPOSED by reference, never invoked.
invariants.residual: ADOPTION: real recommendation→action engagement volume is usage-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

invariants.title: Intervention → Reassessment (the action is followed by a re-measurement)
invariants.mechanism: After an intervention, the reassessment signal (getReassessmentSignal) surfaces interval/exit re-administration eligibility from the accrued longitudinal record. MECHANISM present (Phase 1.3 reuse); gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture.
invariants.residual: ADOPTION: real re-administration volume is usage-driven (honest-low/0; reported separately — Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

invariants.title: Reassessment → Improvement validation (the re-measurement is compared to the baseline)
invariants.mechanism: A second datapoint lets the longitudinal trend validate improvement vs the prior baseline. MECHANISM present; effectiveness/accuracy stays abstained (no decision-time prediction recorded) until real volume accrues — honest-null, never fabricated.
invariants.residual: ADOPTION + CONFIDENCE: improvement is measurable once >1 non-demo datapoint exists; calibrated accuracy is abstained by design (Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption, null≠0).

invariants.title: Improvement → Promotion / Outcome (validated growth advances the lifecycle stage)
invariants.mechanism: Validated readiness drives stage promotion (evidence-gate readiness band) and a realized-outcome capture into the canonical ledger. MECHANISM present (evidence-gate + progression-outcome-capture); promotion is readiness-DERIVED, not a uniformly enforced per-persona gate (see GAP-P1).
invariants.residual: ENGINEERING (GAP-P1, Medium): promotion criteria are readiness-derived, not a single enforced gate across all personas. ADOPTION: realized-outcome volume is usage-driven (null≠0).

promotion_rules.label: Curiosity
promotion_rules.entryCriteria: First-touch / entry assessment started (or anonymous first signal).
promotion_rules.exitCriteria: A scored baseline exists and the first AI diagnosis has been surfaced.
promotion_rules.requiredEvidence: At least one scored session captured into the longitudinal record.
promotion_rules.requiredOutcomes: Diagnosis delivered (no realized growth-outcome required yet).
promotion_rules.promotionRule: Curiosity→Insight when a baseline + diagnosis exist (readiness band derived by evidence-gate; promotion recorded in wc3_stage_progression).
promotion_rules.statusNote: Entry → baseline → diagnosis is the most mature segment of the loop.

promotion_rules.label: Insight
promotion_rules.exitCriteria: Recommendations + a learning/intervention plan have been generated and acted on.
promotion_rules.requiredEvidence: Recommendation + intervention/learning-plan generated for the diagnosed gap.
promotion_rules.requiredOutcomes: Growth action started (recommendation engagement); realized-outcome adoption-gated.
promotion_rules.promotionRule: Insight→Growth when a growth plan is generated and the subject begins acting (recommendation→action link, INV1).
promotion_rules.statusNote: Recommendation + learning + intervention generation is well-supported (reused engines).

promotion_rules.label: Growth
promotion_rules.entryCriteria: A growth plan is active and the subject is acting on recommendations.
promotion_rules.exitCriteria: A reassessment shows validated improvement vs the baseline (INV2 + INV3).
promotion_rules.requiredOutcomes: Validated improvement captured; realized-outcome ledger entry (adoption-gated).
promotion_rules.promotionRule: Growth→Mastery when reassessment validates sustained improvement (readiness band high) — readiness-DERIVED (GAP-P1: not a uniformly enforced per-persona gate).
promotion_rules.statusNote: Reassessment + improvement MECHANISM present (Phase 1.3 reuse + longitudinal trend); the exit→promotion link is readiness-derived and the validation is ADOPTION-pending (>1 non-demo datapoint required). Coverage⟂Adoption⟂Confidence never composited.

promotion_rules.label: Mastery
promotion_rules.entryCriteria: Sustained validated improvement; readiness at the top band.
promotion_rules.exitCriteria: Exit / continuous assessment confirms mastery; outcome realized + loop re-enters.
promotion_rules.requiredOutcomes: Realized mastery outcome captured (reached_mastery milestone); continuous-development re-entry.
promotion_rules.promotionRule: Mastery is terminal in the coded ladder; the loop re-enters via continuous-development (reassessment cadence) — adoption-gated.
promotion_rules.statusNote: Reached-Mastery + exit-eligibility MECHANISM present (progression-outcome-capture reached_mastery + getReassessmentSignal). Continuous re-entry cadence is adoption-gated; realized mastery-outcome volume is honest-low/0 (Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

paths.label: Student → Career Growth
paths.aiInterpretation: Behavioural signal → concern routing + competency diagnosis (PIL runtime guidance).
paths.recommendationRule: Career-builder growth recommendations + growth-plan bridge (decision orchestrator).
paths.learningPath: Guided learning plan (learning-path-engine) surfaced in Career Builder.
paths.reassessmentRule: Interval reassessment signal (getReassessmentSignal) once a baseline accrues; adoption-gated.
paths.outcomes: Career direction chosen / measurable growth progressed; realized-outcome tail adoption-gated.
paths.promotionRule: Curiosity→Insight→Growth via baseline+diagnosis then growth-plan action (INV1).
paths.successCriteria: Assessment completion; recommendation engagement; positive re-measure movement.
paths.statusNote: Strong front-half (assessment→diagnose→recommend→learn→intervene). Progress measurement MECHANISM present; per-journey reassessment/improvement is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Fresher → Placement Readiness
paths.aiInterpretation: Competency + readiness diagnosis; role-DNA crosswalk for fit.
paths.learningPath: Launchpad learning plan toward role readiness (learning-path-engine).
paths.reassessmentRule: Readiness re-measure as launchpad checklist advances; adoption-gated.
paths.promotionRule: Curiosity→Insight→Growth as readiness band rises (evidence-gate); placement = realized outcome.
paths.successCriteria: Launchpad completion; readiness uplift; application + placement rate.
paths.statusNote: Launchpad + campus placement readiness loop is live; realized placement-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

paths.label: Professional → Role Progression
paths.learningPath: Progression learning plan toward the next role band.
paths.reassessmentRule: Interval reassessment (longitudinal-automation cadence) → improvement validation vs baseline.
paths.outcomes: Role progression / promotion; adoption-gated realized-outcome tail.
paths.promotionRule: Growth→Mastery on validated sustained improvement (readiness-DERIVED — GAP-P1).
paths.successCriteria: Re-run rate; positive-movement rate; progression cadence.
paths.statusNote: Reaches the FULL loop incl. reassessment→improvement→promotion as a MECHANISM, but promotion is DERIVED (not a uniformly enforced per-persona gate, GAP-P1) and validation is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption⟂Confidence).

paths.label: Employee → Competency / EI Development
paths.learningPath: Competency development plan against the genome.
paths.reassessmentRule: EI re-measure (ei_profile_snapshots) as development progresses; adoption-gated.
paths.outcomes: Competency uplift; EI development; adoption-gated outcome tail.
paths.promotionRule: Insight→Growth as competency/EI band rises (evidence-gate readiness).
paths.successCriteria: Baseline coverage; competency movement; EI delta.
paths.statusNote: Competency + EI development diagnosis is well-supported (mei + intervention engines); realized development-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

paths.label: HR / Recruiter → Hiring Progression
paths.recommendationRule: Talent-match ranking → interview → hire decision support.
paths.learningPath: N/A for recruiter (the candidate is the learner) — reuse only.
paths.reassessmentRule: Candidate re-assessment across funnel stages; calibration accrues at k_min=30.
paths.successCriteria: Funnel conversion; time-to-decision; match quality; calibration (k≥30).
paths.statusNote: The 9-stage hiring funnel is the most complete progression family. Realized hiring-outcome capture exists; adoption + calibration reported separately (Adoption⟂Coverage; Brier/ECE abstain <k_min=30).

paths.label: Institute Admin → Cohort Progression
paths.reassessmentRule: Cohort re-measure across terms (longitudinal aggregate); adoption-gated.
paths.promotionRule: Cohort movement across bands (aggregate trend); no individual promotion gate.
paths.successCriteria: Cohort coverage; cohort movement; placement rate.
paths.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H) — scores masked below k_min, roster always shown. Realized cohort-outcome tail adoption-gated.

paths.label: Parent → Support Child Growth
paths.aiInterpretation: Child progress framing via consent-scoped view.
paths.interventionPath: Parent support actions reinforcing the child growth loop (jt_parent_support_actions).
paths.learningPath: N/A for parent (the child is the learner) — reuse only.
paths.reassessmentRule: Child re-measure surfaced to the parent; support action fires a journey-tail milestone.
paths.outcomes: Support actions logged → child growth loop continuation (captureJourneyTailMilestone).
paths.promotionRule: No parent promotion; reinforces the child progression (INV1 reinforcement link).
paths.successCriteria: Consent rate; support-action adoption; child positive movement.
paths.statusNote: Support-action substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_parent_support_actions, fail-closed on child ownership) and a completed action fires a journey-tail milestone into the universal outcome tail (longitudinalOutcomeCapture-gated). Residual is ADOPTION (real support-action volume — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Mentor / Coach → Mentee Progression
paths.interventionPath: Mentor engagement milestones reinforcing the mentee loop (jt_mentor_engagements).
paths.reassessmentRule: Mentee re-measure across engagements; milestone fires into the outcome tail.
paths.outcomes: Mentee engagement logged → guidance loop continuation (captureJourneyTailMilestone).
paths.promotionRule: No mentor promotion; advances the mentee progression (INV1/INV2 links).
paths.successCriteria: Match rate; engagement cadence; mentee movement.
paths.statusNote: Engagement substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_mentor_engagements, gated BOTH directions via mentor_bookings to avoid IDOR) and a milestone fires into the universal outcome tail (longitudinalOutcomeCapture-gated). Residual is ADOPTION (real engagement volume — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Faculty → Batch Progression
paths.promotionRule: Batch movement across bands (aggregate); no individual promotion gate.
paths.statusNote: Faculty batch-confined progress view EXISTS (institutional-intelligence, role-scoped batch-confined access; MX-302H). Aggregate-only — no per-individual progression. Adoption-gated cohort volume (Coverage⟂Adoption).

decisions.rationale: The continuous-growth loop is realised by EXISTING engines (progression-outcome-capture, evidence-gate, recommendation/learning/intervention/longitudinal). This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry, never a parallel progression engine.

Promotion is derived from evidence-gate readiness bands recorded in wc3_stage_progression, NOT a new hard gate. A uniformly enforced per-persona promotion gate is GAP-P1 (Medium) — additive/optional, never fabricated as done.

getReassessmentSignal derives eligibility on read (no scheduler). Automated cadence (wc7b/longitudinal-automation) is adoption-gated. Continuous growth is a MECHANISM (Coverage) whose ADOPTION is usage-driven (null≠0).

coverage.label: Student → Career Growth
coverage.statusNote: Strong front-half (assessment→diagnose→recommend→learn→intervene). Progress measurement MECHANISM present; per-journey reassessment/improvement is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

coverage.label: Fresher → Placement Readiness
coverage.statusNote: Launchpad + campus placement readiness loop is live; realized placement-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

coverage.label: Professional → Role Progression
coverage.statusNote: Reaches the FULL loop incl. reassessment→improvement→promotion as a MECHANISM, but promotion is DERIVED (not a uniformly enforced per-persona gate, GAP-P1) and validation is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption⟂Confidence).

coverage.label: Employee → Competency / EI Development
coverage.statusNote: Competency + EI development diagnosis is well-supported (mei + intervention engines); realized development-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

coverage.label: HR / Recruiter → Hiring Progression
coverage.statusNote: The 9-stage hiring funnel is the most complete progression family. Realized hiring-outcome capture exists; adoption + calibration reported separately (Adoption⟂Coverage; Brier/ECE abstain <k_min=30).

coverage.label: Institute Admin → Cohort Progression
coverage.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H) — scores masked below k_min, roster always shown. Realized cohort-outcome tail adoption-gated.

coverage.label: Parent → Support Child Growth
coverage.statusNote: Support-action substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_parent_support_actions, fail-closed on child ownership) and a completed action fires a journey-tail milestone into the universal outcome tail (longitudinalOutcomeCapture-gated). Residual is ADOPTION (real support-action volume — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

coverage.label: Mentor / Coach → Mentee Progression
coverage.statusNote: Engagement substrate EXISTS (journeyTailCompletion: jt_mentor_engagements, gated BOTH directions via mentor_bookings to avoid IDOR) and a milestone fires into the universal outcome tail (longitudinalOutcomeCapture-gated). Residual is ADOPTION (real engagement volume — Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

coverage.label: Faculty → Batch Progression
coverage.statusNote: Faculty batch-confined progress view EXISTS (institutional-intelligence, role-scoped batch-confined access; MX-302H). Aggregate-only — no per-individual progression. Adoption-gated cohort volume (Coverage⟂Adoption).

gaps.title: Promotion is readiness-DERIVED, not a uniformly enforced per-persona gate
gaps.evidence: evidence-gate supplies a readiness band (scoreToLevelBand) recorded in wc3_stage_progression, and promotion is derived from it; but there is no single enforced "promotion gate" applied identically across all persona paths (INV4 link is derived, not gated).
gaps.remediation: OPTIONAL/ADDITIVE: behind a flag, wire the existing evidence-gate readiness as a hard precondition to a stage transition per persona. Reuse-only (no new engine); never block byte-identical-OFF. Not Launch-Critical.

gaps.title: Practice-activity & behaviour-reinforcement steps are recommendation/intervention-driven (no explicit logged practice-completion substrate)
gaps.evidence: practice_activity + behaviour_reinforcement spine steps are surfaced via the recommendation/intervention catalogs; reinforcement is inferred from re-measurement rather than an explicit "practice completed" event log.
gaps.remediation: OPTIONAL/ADDITIVE: if explicit practice-completion telemetry is later required, REUSE the existing intervention substrate (capadex_interventions) with a completion flag rather than a new table. Low priority.

gaps.title: Calibrated improvement→promotion effectiveness/accuracy is deliberately abstained
gaps.evidence: learning/progression milestones carry NO decision-time prediction (predicted_prob_at_decision is NULL by design), so empirical accuracy of the improvement→promotion link is honestly abstained (Confidence axis), distinct from Coverage. This is a deliberate honesty choice, not a bug.
gaps.remediation: FUTURE: once real non-demo re-administration volume + a prediction substrate exist, compute effectiveness/calibration over the EXISTING ledger (validation_loop_outcomes). Never fabricate accuracy before the data exists.

resolved_gaps.title: Universal close-the-loop realized-outcome capture
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE (Phase 1.3): captureProgressionOutcome + captureJourneyTailMilestone write realized growth/mastery/engagement milestones into the canonical ledger (validation_loop_outcomes). Gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture → byte-identical OFF. No new engine/table/DDL.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: real realized-outcome volume is usage-driven (honest-low/0; reported by composeProgressionAdoption — Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

resolved_gaps.title: Evidence-gated readiness / promotion derivation
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: evidence-gate composes the readiness band (scoreToLevelBand + k-anonymity data-sufficiency) recorded in wc3_stage_progression; the composer READS it, never re-derives. Gated by evidenceGatedProgression → byte-identical OFF.
resolved_gaps.residual: ENGINEERING (GAP-P1, Medium): promotion is derived from readiness, not uniformly gated per persona.

resolved_gaps.title: Interval / exit reassessment eligibility signal
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: getReassessmentSignal derives interval/exit re-administration eligibility ON READ from the accrued longitudinal record (no scheduler, no write). Gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture → byte-identical OFF.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: real re-administration cadence is usage-driven (null≠0).

decisions.rationale: The continuous-growth loop is realised by EXISTING engines (progression-outcome-capture, evidence-gate, recommendation/learning/intervention/longitudinal). This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry, never a parallel progression engine.

Promotion is derived from evidence-gate readiness bands recorded in wc3_stage_progression, NOT a new hard gate. A uniformly enforced per-persona promotion gate is GAP-P1 (Medium) — additive/optional, never fabricated as done.

getReassessmentSignal derives eligibility on read (no scheduler). Automated cadence (wc7b/longitudinal-automation) is adoption-gated. Continuous growth is a MECHANISM (Coverage) whose ADOPTION is usage-driven (null≠0).

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Progression Model answers "Is CAPADEX capable of measurable, continuous customer growth?": a FROZEN 15-step growth spine (Assessment→Evidence→AI→Recommend→Learn→Practice→Reinforce→Competency→Intervene→Measure→Reassess→Validate→Outcome→Promote→Continue), four lifecycle promotion rules (Curiosity→Insight→Growth→Mastery), four loop-closure invariants, and a per-persona path register — every field mapped to the eight progression axes and verified against the live repo. The growth LOOP is mechanism-complete via REUSE-before-build: Phase 1.3 closed the universal realized-outcome capture (progression-outcome-capture) and the evidence-gated readiness (evidence-gate); recommendation/learning/intervention/longitudinal engines supply the middle of the loop. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry + ZERO new growth logic + ZERO schema. OPEN engineering gaps are NONE Launch-Critical (GAP-P1 Medium: promotion is readiness-derived not uniformly gated; GAP-P2 Low: practice/reinforcement are recommendation-driven; GAP-P3 Future: calibrated effectiveness deliberately abstained). The dominant remaining axis is ADOPTION (real re-administration/outcome volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY by composeProgressionAdoption) — a usage axis, NOT a gap. The verdict stays STRUCTURAL (engineering complete via reuse; adoption is usage-driven and never fabricated). Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Outcome⟂Adoption are reported separately and never composited; null≠0.

invariants.residual: ADOPTION: real re-administration volume is usage-driven (honest-low/0; reported separately — Adoption⟂Coverage, null≠0).

invariants.title: Reassessment → Improvement validation (the re-measurement is compared to the baseline)
invariants.mechanism: A second datapoint lets the longitudinal trend validate improvement vs the prior baseline. MECHANISM present; effectiveness/accuracy stays abstained (no decision-time prediction recorded) until real volume accrues — honest-null, never fabricated.
invariants.residual: ADOPTION + CONFIDENCE: improvement is measurable once >1 non-demo datapoint exists; calibrated accuracy is abstained by design (Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption, null≠0).

invariants.title: Improvement → Promotion / Outcome (validated growth advances the lifecycle stage)
invariants.mechanism: Validated readiness drives stage promotion (evidence-gate readiness band) and a realized-outcome capture into the canonical ledger. MECHANISM present (evidence-gate + progression-outcome-capture); promotion is readiness-DERIVED, not a uniformly enforced per-persona gate (see GAP-P1).
invariants.residual: ENGINEERING (GAP-P1, Medium): promotion criteria are readiness-derived, not a single enforced gate across all personas. ADOPTION: realized-outcome volume is usage-driven (null≠0).

loop_closure.note: Each invariant is a COVERAGE statement: the existing mechanism that LINKS two spine steps is present (services + ≥1 backing table verified). Coverage of the loop links is SEPARATE from ADOPTION (is the loop exercised by real non-demo volume — see composeProgressionAdoption) and from CONFIDENCE (calibrated effectiveness — abstained by design). null≠0; nothing fabricated; no link is invoked, only verified by reference.

adoption.note: ADOPTION axis only — exercise of the (Phase-1.3 reuse-instrumented) continuous-growth loop. SEPARATE from Coverage; never composited. null = unreadable, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. The capture hook is gated by the longitudinalOutcomeCapture flag, so non-zero adoption accrues only as real subjects progress / re-administer existing assessments. This phase builds NO new growth machinery.

persona_linkage.note: Persona⟂Progression linkage validated by a READ-TIME join (no persona column added, zero DDL). Per-persona counts below k_min are suppressed (masked) for anonymity. linkage_present:false means the join was unreadable, NOT that outcomes are zero (null≠0). Coverage⟂Outcome⟂Confidence never composited.
